betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Coker Unit§f

§aA towering 24-block machine that thermally cracks heavy residues into petroleum coke and valuable byproducts!§f

The §bCoker Unit§f is a massive multiblock, towering at §e24 blocks§f tall — just 1 block shorter than the Hydraulic Fracking Tower. It converts petroleum products into §bPetroleum Coke§f along with §bCoker Oil§f, §bCoker Naphtha§f, or §bCoker Gas§f. It requires an §bexternal heat source§f to function (similar to the Crucible) and is one of the most polluting machines in the mod, spreading §e20 soot/s§f.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Machine):
§b• §e8×§f Welded Steel Plate
§b• §e4×§f Steel Shell
§b• §e8×§f Copper Plate
§b• §e4×§f Rubber Bar
§b• §e4×§f Niobium Ingot

§6Recipes§f:
§b• §e11,000mB§f Heavy Oil → §e1×§f Petroleum Coke + §e1,100mB§f Coker Oil.
§b• §e16,000mB§f Bitumen → §e1×§f Petroleum Coke + §e1,600mB§f Coker Oil.
§b• §e16,000mB§f Naphtha → §e1×§f Petroleum Coke + §e1,600mB§f Coker Naphtha.
§b• §e4,900mB§f Naphtha → §e1×§f Petroleum Coke + §e490mB§f Coker Naphtha.
§b• §e7,900mB§f Industrial Oil → §e1×§f Petroleum Coke + §e790mB§f Coker Oil.
§b• §e590mB§f Diesel → §e1×§f Petroleum Coke + §e59mB§f Coker Naphtha.
§b• §e370mB§f Light Oil → §e1×§f Petroleum Coke + §e37mB§f Coker Gas.
§b• §e125mB§f Calcium Solution → §e1×§f Calcium Powder + §e100mB§f Low-Pressure Steam.
§b• §e250mB§f Sour Gas → §e1×§f Sulfur + §e150mB§f Coker Gas.
§b• §e10,000mB§f Fish Oil → §e1×§f Petroleum Coke + §e1,000mB§f Mercury.
§b• §e2,000mB§f Wood Oil → §e1×§f Charcoal + §e200mB§f Coker Gas.
§b• §e4,000mB§f Poisonous Mud → §e4×§f Solid Mud Bricks (no coke or fluid).

§eTip§f: Coker fluids can be fractioned further! §bCoker Oil§f in the Fractioning Tower yields §bHeating Oil§f + §bCracked Oil§f. §bCoker Naphtha§f yields §bCracked Naphtha§f + §bCracked Light Oil§f. Plan your piping to feed these directly into a fractioning setup!
